project_context: FrameForge - A dark, cyber/tech 'HUD' aesthetic for gamers & streamers.
mission: Declutter all application pages (EXCEPT Landing Page), strictly maintain existing style/colors, make layouts less chaotic, and ensure lightweight/fast rendering.

design_strategy.chaos_reduction: Standardize layout rhythm. Stop mixing disparate card sizes. Use a strict grid. Reduce ambient glow and neon border overuse. Make 80% of the UI monochrome zinc/black and reserve Volt Yellow (#E5FF00) strictly for primary actions or active states.
design_strategy.performance: Replace heavy JS-driven layout animations with lightweight CSS transitions. Use CSS 'content-visibility' for off-screen heavy components (like charts). Implement simple pulsing CSS skeletons instead of complex loading states.
design_strategy.consistency: Use standard layout primitives across all 20+ app pages. Every page must feel like part of the same unified 'OS' terminal.

fonts.display: Preserve existing display font (used for headings).
fonts.sans: Preserve existing sans-serif font (used for body).
fonts.mono: Preserve existing monospace font (used for metrics, code blocks, eyebrow labels, and numeric data to prevent jitter).

rules.eyebrows: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#E5FF00] mb-2 block

declutter_rules: Remove unnecessary glowing drop-shadows on standard cards.
Limit the number of active accent colors on screen. If a section is informational, rely on Zinc/White/Black. Save neon for alerts or primary CTAs.

grids_and_layouts.page_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 w-full
grids_and_layouts.vertical_rhythm: space-y-8 or gap-8 between major sections. Use gap-4 or space-y-4 inside cards.
grids_and_layouts.bento_density: For dense data (Live, MyPc): Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4. Keep heights consistent using 'h-full flex flex-col'.

PageHeader.description: Standardized header for every app page.
PageHeader.structure:
// {eyebrow}

{title}

{subtitle &&

{subtitle}

}
{actions &&
{actions}
}

HUDCard.description: Standard container replacing random div styles. Strict sharp edges.
HUDCard.classes: bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#2A2A35] rounded-none p-5 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col
HUDCard.optional_accent: Add a absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E5FF00]/50 to-transparent for active/featured cards.

DataMetric.description: For Live telemetry and MyPc hardware stats. Group logically.
DataMetric.structure:
{label}
{value} {unit}

page_specific_guidance.Live_and_MyPc: High-density telemetry. Strip away decorative graphics that cause reflows. Use the `DataMetric` pattern inside a strict 4-column grid. Ensure all numbers use `tabular-nums` to prevent horizontal jitter during rapid updates.
page_specific_guidance.Tracker: Amazon-style product cards must be unified. Use the `HUDCard` primitive. Align product image, strict 2-line truncated title, and price. Remove nested borders to reduce visual noise.
page_specific_guidance.Advisor_and_BuildGenerator: Step-by-step layout. Use a single central column (max-w-4xl) for form inputs rather than wide stretching fields. Group sections with subtle `border-b border-[#2A2A35] pb-6`.
page_specific_guidance.Auth_Account_Security: Forms must use standard Shadcn/UI inputs styled with square corners (`rounded-none`), `#09090B` backgrounds, and `#2A2A35` borders. Focus state must strictly use `#E5FF00` ring.
page_specific_guidance.DesktopAgent: Clearly separate the instructions. Use a distinct `#0A0A0C` terminal block for the .ps1 script with a subtle copy button. Emphasize the token securely.

performance_and_motion.loading_states: Do not use heavy Lottie/JS loaders. Use CSS skeletons: `<div className="animate-pulse bg-[#2A2A35] h-full w-full" />`
performance_and_motion.transitions: Limit to simple CSS transitions on interactive elements: `transition-colors duration-200` or `transition-opacity`. Avoid animating width/height or layout properties to prevent jank.
performance_and_motion.charts: If using Recharts, disable heavy animation on mount for the 'Live' page to ensure immediate render.

accessibility_and_ux.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use dark gray text on black backgrounds for critical info (minimum text-zinc-400).
accessibility_and_ux.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus state: `focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#E5FF00] focus-visible:border-[#E5FF00]`
accessibility_and_ux.overlays: CRITICAL: Do not use fully transparent backgrounds in headers, overlays, dropdowns, or modals. Always use `bg-[#09090B]/95 backdrop-blur-md`.

instructions_to_main_agent.target_files: This project uses .js files, NOT .tsx. Output pure React JS.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: CRITICAL: Do NOT touch, modify, or rewrite the Landing Page. It is perfect as is.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme: Do NOT invent new colors, themes, or gradients. Stick strictly to the #09090B / #E5FF00 HUD aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based) to facilitate automated testing.
instructions_to_main_agent.execution_mode: Go file by file through the dashboard pages. Replace chaotic, nested divs with the streamlined `HUDCard` and `PageContainer` standard primitives. Remove redundant visual noise.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.1: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid 'AI slop'. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight, while adhering strictly to the FrameForge HUD theme.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.2: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep borders and backgrounds flat/matte (cyberpunk style) rather than bubbly/soft.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.3: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties (colors, opacity).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.4: You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.5: Always use sharp-edged modern button styles matching the theme, with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.6: NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use standard icon libraries (e.g., Lucide).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.7: Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner components are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.js`.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.8: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
